hero.tagline: From origin to your table, with full traceability
hero.subtitle: Premium specialty coffee and comprehensive food distribution for international markets

about.title: Your Strategic Partner in International Trade
about.p1: At Global Distribuidora y Comercializadora, C.A., we are more than importers and exporters; we are essential facilitators who bring the flavors of the world to your table and unlock your product's potential in international markets.
about.p2: We operate as a comprehensive strategic partner, managing the complexities of cross-border trade from start to finish, specializing in exceptional coffee with full traceability and efficient distribution of all types of food products.

coffee.title: Commitment to Origin: Our Coffee
coffee.description: We are dedicated to the import and export of exceptional coffee beans, carefully selecting premium and specialty lots and ensuring full traceability from farm to roaster.
points: Hand-selected premium and specialty coffee beans
Rigorous quality control on every lot
Aroma and flavor profile preservation throughout the chain

food.title: Global Efficiency: Food and Distribution
food.description: From fresh and perishable goods that require impeccable cold-chain management to dry and packaged products, our logistics system is designed for speed, safety, and full regulatory compliance.
points: Speed and safety in every shipment

representation.title: International Corporate Representation
representation.description: We offer our corporate representation services to support your company's development and expansion into international markets. We assist in identifying opportunities, managing strategic relationships, and strengthening your global presence.
representation.cta: For further information, contact us via email or WhatsApp.
points: Strategic relationship and global networking management
End-to-end support throughout every expansion stage

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To connect global markets with superior-quality food products by importing and exporting exceptional coffee and providing robust logistics solutions for the efficient distribution and commercialization of all types of food products. We are committed to operating with unwavering efficiency, strict regulatory compliance, and complete customer satisfaction throughout the entire supply chain.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become a leading global benchmark in the food supply chain, recognized for our excellence in the import and export of gourmet coffee and our agile and innovative distribution capabilities across all categories of food products, setting the standards for trust, efficiency, and sustainability in international trade.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Next Shipment
contact.subtitle: Receive a personalized quote

events.title: Events we have attended
events.subtitle: Continuous presence at the most relevant international trade shows in the gourmet, specialty coffee and food distribution sector.

announcement.banner: See us at the 39th Salón Gourmets · IFEMA Madrid · April 13–16

trust.title: Brands & Certifications
trust.subtitle: We work with recognized brands from Venezuela and Colombia, backed by international certifications that open doors to global markets.

podcast.title: The specialty coffee podcast
podcast.subtitle: Conversations about origin, roasting, coffee culture, and international trade. Follow us and never miss an episode.

footer.description: Import, export and distribution of premium coffee and superior quality food products.
